infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Pem uses the microphone to turn what you say into on-device text for your dump.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pem uses your photo library so you can attach images to chat (for example a receipt or list).
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pem uses the camera so you can snap a photo and attach it to chat.

plugins.photosPermission: Pem uses your photos so you can attach images to chat.
plugins.cameraPermission: Pem uses the camera so you can snap a photo to attach in chat.
